_comment: Minimum audio-quality baseline frozen at git tag v0.1.0-audio-baseline (2026-06-17). Future changes must NOT regress below these. Values are the acceptance targets from instruction.txt, anchored to the measured working state. The audio bench reads this to decide pass/fail. Edit ONLY when intentionally raising the bar.

measured_reference._comment: What we actually measured at freeze time (for context, not enforced directly).
